author: nero_eth
content:
I put up a PR for adding snap v2 to the devp2p specs, similar as it was done for caps/snap.md:
https://github.com/ethereum/devp2p/pull/269

I used it to clarify two things, pivot block advancement with applying BALs between old pivot and new pivot, and handling reorgs past the pivot block.
